decks.notes: The deck focuses on assembling the Allosaurus Combo by utilizing cards like Eldritch Evolution and Neoform to tutor for and cheat out powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The deck also utilizes cards like Nourishing Shoal and Planar Genesis to gain life and generate tokens, while using Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to protect its combo pieces. By combining these elements, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures and game-ending abilities.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while also utilizing burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to control the board and deal direct damage. The deck also includes cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for additional removal and threat generation. The inclusion of cards like Static Prison and Blood Moon helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan and secure the aggro deck's victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively bring down the opponent's life total using Death's Shadow as a powerful threat, while also disrupting their game plan with hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and countering key spells with counterspells. The deck also aims to control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Tarfire, while utilizing card draw and card selection to find the right answers and threats. The synergy between life loss effects, card draw, and threat density makes this deck a highly competitive choice in the Modern format.

The key concept of this Jeskai Control deck is to use a combination of artifacts and control spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up powerful win conditions like Emry, Lurker of the Loch, and Thundering Falls. By utilizing cards like Isochron Scepter, Metallic Rebuke, and Orim's Chant to control the board and protect its threats, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and grind out wins through card advantage. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Mishra's Bauble and Urza's Saga provides additional card selection and mana acceleration to stay ahead in the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and powerful spells to overwhelm opponents quickly. It includes a mix of efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu, backed up by powerful spells like Lightning Bolt and Leyline of the Guildpact. The deck also includes Leyline Binding and Stubborn Denial for added control elements. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption, while Scion of Draco and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury offer potent finishers. With a variety of land options for consistency and flexibility, the deck aims to maintain pressure and disrupt opponents effectively.

The key idea of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly through land drops and Amulet of Vigor, while using Primeval Titan and Scapeshift to search for and bring out powerful lands like Urza's Saga and Boseiju, Who Endures. This allows for explosive plays that can overwhelm the opponent and establish a strong board presence. The inclusion of Malevolent Rumble, Aftermath Analyst, and Echoing Deeps helps with removal and control, while cards like Arboreal Grazer and Lotus Field provide additional ramp options. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces efficiently to set up game-winning plays.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm opponents. The key strategy is to consistently deal damage early in the game using efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, while also having access to powerful removal spells like Galvanic Discharge. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory provide added value and resilience to the deck, allowing it to maintain pressure and close out games quickly.

This deck focuses on aggressively disrupting the opponent's game plan while developing its own board presence with efficient creatures and removal spells. It aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game and control the battlefield with disruptive spells and abilities. The deck utilizes a mix of creatures with powerful abilities and versatile removal spells to keep the opponent on the back foot and secure the victory. Key cards include Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, Solitude, and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, as well as removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Wrath of the Skies.

The deck focuses on efficiently and aggressively deploying artifacts to generate value and overwhelm the opponent. Cards like Urza's Saga and Mishra's Bauble help to accelerate gameplay and provide additional resources. Emry, Lurker of the Loch can recur artifacts from the graveyard, while Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke offer disruption and removal options. With a mix of creatures and artifacts, the deck aims to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure on the opponent, utilizing the synergy between artifacts and creatures to gain advantage and secure victory.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with low-cost creatures and burn spells. It aims to control the board and deal damage as efficiently as possible, using cards like Lightning Bolt, Lava Dart, and Dragon's Rage Channeler. The deck also includes cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Slickshot Show-Off to keep up the pressure on the opponent. Overall, the deck prioritizes speed and aggression to win the game before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, Scion of Draco, Cosmogoyf, and Territorial Kavu to apply aggressive pressure on the opponent. This deck also includes Leyline cards for added protection and disruption, with Stubborn Denial for countering spells. Lightning Bolt and Thud provide additional removal and direct damage, allowing for quick victories through aggressive play. Additionally, the deck includes mana fixing with various land cards like Verdant Catacombs and Scalding Tarn. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient aggressive strategy.

This Modern Ruby Storm deck focuses on quickly generating mana and drawing cards to set up explosive combo turns. The deck utilizes rituals like Desperate Ritual and Pyretic Ritual along with cards like Manamorphose and Ral, Monsoon Mage to generate mana and draw cards. The deck also includes ways to flashback key cards with Past in Flames and finish off the opponent with cards like Grapeshot. The goal is to assemble the right combination of cards to storm off and win the game in a single turn.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence and apply pressure to the opponent through aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. The deck includes powerful cards such as Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to establish a strong battlefield. Additionally, cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge provide additional ways to deal damage to the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Dalkovan Encampment and Elegant Parlor helps to support the aggressive strategy by providing additional benefits to the creatures. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and efficient removal spells to pressure opponents quickly. The key strategy is to curve out early threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer, while also leveraging powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes disruption cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ranger-Captain of Eos to control the board and protect your threats. Additionally, the inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provides additional reach and finishing power to close out games decisively.

This mono black aggro deck focuses on early disruption and control with cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push, while also utilizing the powerful Eldrazi creatures to apply pressure quickly. With a mix of hand disruption, removal spells, and efficient threats, the deck aims to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily advancing towards victory. The deck also includes cards like Urza's Saga and Mishra's Bauble to generate card advantage and provide additional utility. Overall, the deck seeks to be proactive and aggressive in its approach to winning the game.

The main focus of this deck is to generate a large amount of mana through spells like Pyretic Ritual and Desperate Ritual, while also utilizing cards like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Grapeshot to deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes card draw and filtering effects like Reckless Impulse and Valakut Awakening to ensure consistency in drawing the necessary combo pieces. The overall strategy is to quickly amass resources and efficiently cast spells to overwhelm the opponent with a storm of damage spells and win the game in a single turn.
